feedback.text: things that i think this should also encompass and why: 1: Stop Killing Games (Stop Destroying Games(EU pettition)) publishers should not have the ability to destroy products sold to customers, can be expanded to encompass more things. 2: unjust censorship of legal content, example: payment processors being pressured to force censorship on Steam and Itch.io platforms (which in my opinion should be illegal for payment processors to do),
